The Site

  • Dirt/gravel clearing, west of Gate 5, behind Vaudeville
  • Bus drives in via Gate 4
  • Pine trees west of venue, for afternoon shade
  • Open sky to the north over parking lot — clean Starlink line
  • On-site RV parking, with exposure towards Gate 5
